name: Diamond Solitaire Pendant
description: A single 0.15ct round brilliant diamond, prong-set in 18kt white gold, suspended on a delicate 16-inch chain. Understated. Unforgettable. The kind of piece you reach for every morning.
careInstructions: Clean with mild soap and a soft toothbrush. Store in the provided box away from other jewellery.
shipping: Ships within 3–5 business days. Free shipping on orders above ₹1000.
returns: Returns accepted within 7 days in original, unworn condition with intact packaging.
